mission: Converge 100% of the declared repository into one connected organism and preserve runtime health end-to-end. PULSE informs, prioritizes, and maps the work; it never blocks execution on its own.

operatingRules: Treat PULSE as the advisory source of truth for current health, scope, and priorities.
Do not assume undeclared code is converged; missing scope is itself a convergence gap.
Preserve honest runtime and model behavior; never replace missing evidence with invented certainty.
